name: DeepSeek-VL2
tagline: MoE vision-language models (tiny/small/base) for advanced multimodal and document/OCR understanding.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-VL2 (DeepSeek), released 2024-12-13 — part of the DeepSeek VL line. MoE vision-language models (tiny/small/base) for advanced multimodal and document/…
overview: DeepSeek-VL2 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek VL line. Released 2024-12-13. Vision-language line for multimodal understanding (image + document + chart reasoning); V2 moved to a MoE backbone.
What's notable in this version: MoE vision-language models (tiny/small/base) for advanced multimodal and document/OCR understanding. Open weights.
